ollama_format.description: Structured smoke output schema for one text response.
ollama_format.title: StructuredSmokeText

structured_output_schema.description: Structured smoke output schema for one text response.
structured_output_schema.title: StructuredSmokeText

response.clean_text:
{ "response_text": "The mean green biomass starts consistently at 45000 across all simulations during the initial 20 years (timesteps 1-20), indicating stable pasture conditions. At year 21, two distinct patterns emerge: approximately half the simulations remain stable at 45000, while the other half transitions to 45090 and maintains this level through timestep 24. Concurrently, one simulation (row 4) shows a sustained early increase, reaching 45213.552 by year 18 and peaking at 45276.8 by year 21 before beginning to decline. From year 25 onward, a consistent downslope appears across most simulations, with biomass dropping 200-300 units by year 28 in many cases. Notably, simulations that showed early growth (e.g., reaching 45276.8) exhibit sharper declines. The pattern suggests initial stability under homogeneous conditions, followed by heterogeneous responses to an environmental perturbation around year 21, culminating in a system-wide decline by year 28."
   
   					  								  							}

parsed_response.response_text: The mean green biomass starts consistently at 45000 across all simulations during the initial 20 years (timesteps 1-20), indicating stable pasture conditions. Concurrently, one simulation (row 4) shows a sustained early increase, reaching 45213.552 by year 18 and peaking at 45276.8 by year 21 before beginning to decline. From year 25 onward, a consistent downslope appears across most simulations, with biomass dropping 200-300 units by year 28 in many cases. Notably, simulations that showed early growth (e.g., reaching 45276.8) exhibit sharper declines. The pattern suggests initial stability under homogeneous conditions, followed by heterogeneous responses to an environmental perturbation around year 21, culminating in a system-wide decline by year 28.

response.raw_text:
{ "response_text": "The mean green biomass starts consistently at 45000 across all simulations during the initial 20 years (timesteps 1-20), indicating stable pasture conditions. At year 21, two distinct patterns emerge: approximately half the simulations remain stable at 45000, while the other half transitions to 45090 and maintains this level through timestep 24. Concurrently, one simulation (row 4) shows a sustained early increase, reaching 45213.552 by year 18 and peaking at 45276.8 by year 21 before beginning to decline. From year 25 onward, a consistent downslope appears across most simulations, with biomass dropping 200-300 units by year 28 in many cases. Notably, simulations that showed early growth (e.g., reaching 45276.8) exhibit sharper declines. The pattern suggests initial stability under homogeneous conditions, followed by heterogeneous responses to an environmental perturbation around year 21, culminating in a system-wide decline by year 28."
   
   					  								  							}
